Module com.example.demo2
Package com.example.demo2.view

Class MenuView

java.lang.Object
com.example.demo2.view.MenuView
All Implemented Interfaces:
IView
public class MenuView extends Object implements IView
View class responsible for displaying the main menu screen. Loads the menu FXML layout and binds it to the primary application stage. Implements IView to follow a consistent view lifecycle contract.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MenuView(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
    Constructs a new MenuView and immediately renders the menu screen.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteView()
    Closes the primary stage, effectively removing the menu view from the screen.
    void
    showView()
    Loads the menu FXML file, builds the scene, and configures the primary stage.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MenuView

      public MenuView(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
      Constructs a new MenuView and immediately renders the menu screen.
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - the main Stage of the JavaFX application

  • Method Details

    • showView

      public void showView()
      Loads the menu FXML file, builds the scene, and configures the primary stage. Sets the window title to "Sudoku", disables resizing, and makes the stage visible. If the FXML file cannot be loaded, the stack trace is printed to standard error.
      Specified by:
      showView in interface IView

    • deleteView

      public void deleteView()
      Closes the primary stage, effectively removing the menu view from the screen.
      Specified by:
      deleteView in interface IView
